Explored originally French 1673, Iowa came U.S. with Louisiana Purchase in1803.
early days Iowa heavy fighting between settlers Indians.
Iowa became state in1846 1857 Moines became capital.
2005 population 2,966,334.
addition Moines, largest cities Cedar Rapids, Davenport, Sioux City Waterloo.
Iowa always been known agricultural powerhouse, producing percent nation's food supply.
Iowa also major producer hard wood lumber.

Southmoreland School District small, suburban public school district located northern Fayette County, Pennsylvania southern Westmoreland County, Pennsylvania.
boroughs Scottdale Everson, well townships East Huntington Upper Tyrone within district boundaries.
Southmoreland School District encompasses approximately square miles.
According 2000 federal census data, serves resident population 15,639.
2009, district residents' capita income $15,876, while median family income $38,993.
Commonwealth, median family income $49,501 United States median family income $49,445, 2010.
According District officials, school year 2007-08, Southmoreland School District provided basic educational services 2,146 pupils.
employed: teachers, full-time part-time support personnel, administrators.
Southmoreland School District received more than $12.6 million state funding school year 2007-08.

Until period European colonization, Argentina relatively sparsely populated wide number diverse cultures with different social organizations, which divided into three main groups.
first group basic hunters food gatherers without development pottery, such Selk'nam Yamana extreme south.
second group advanced hunters food gatherers which include Puelche, Querandí Serranos center-east; Tehuelche south Wichi north.
last group farmers with pottery, like Charrúa, Minuane Guaraní northeast, with slash burn semisedentary existence; advanced Diaguita sedentary trading culture northwest; Toconoté Hênîa Kâmîare country's center, Huarpe center-west, culture that raised llama cattle strongly influenced Incas.
Europeans first arrived region with 1502 voyage Amerigo Vespucci.
Argentine Independence (1810-1818) followed extended civil that lasted until 1861, culminating country's reorganization federation provinces with Buenos Aires capital city.
country thereafter enjoyed relative peace stability, with massive waves European immigration radically reshaping cultural demographic outlook.
almost-unparalleled increase prosperity Argentina becoming seventh wealthiest developed nation world early 20th century.
After serving several government positions, including Minister Labour Vice President, Juan Domingo Perón, went 1946 election.
During first presidential term (1946-52), Perón supported second wife, Duarte ("Evita"), were immensely popular among many Argentines.
died 1952, Perón elected second term, serving from 1952 until 1955.
During following period military dictatorships, interrupted civilian governments, Peronist party outlawed Perón exiled.
When left-wing Peronist Hector Cámpora elected President 1973, Perón returned Argentina soon after elected President third time.
third wife, María Estela Martínez, known Isabel Perón, elected Vice President ticket succeeded President upon death 1974.
1976 Argentine coup right-wing coup d'état that overthrew Isabel Perón March 1976, Argentina.
place, military junta installed, which headed General Jorge Rafael Videla.
junta took official name "National Reorganization Process", remained power until December 1983.
Although political repression (the so-called "Dirty War") began long before coup, heavily extended after event resulted "disappearances" around 30.000 persons.
Raúl Alfonsín 1983 elections campaigning prosecution those responsible human rights violations: Trial Juntas other martial courts sentenced coup's leaders.
worsening economic crisis hyperinflation reduced popular support Peronist Carlos Menem 1989 election.
visited Argentina november 2005.
Becourse Argentina large varied, supports wild range flora fauna.
country's subtropical rainforests, palm savannas, hight-altitude deserts, high-altitude steppes, humid temperate grasslands, alpine sub-Antarctic forests coasstal areas support distinctive biota that will unfamiliar most visitors.
